patterns.name: file_reading_pattern
patterns.description: Reading files to understand code structure
patterns.optimization: Use startLine/endLine parameters to reduce file size

patterns.name: search_and_edit_pattern
patterns.description: Finding occurrences and making targeted edits
patterns.optimization: Combine related edits in single multi_replace call

patterns.name: implementation_pattern
patterns.optimization: Plan structure first, then execute in batches

patterns.name: debugging_pattern
patterns.optimization: Use terminal logs to narrow down issues before code review

patterns.name: documentation_pattern
patterns.optimization: Use grep_search to find examples instead of semantic search

patterns.name: refactoring_pattern
patterns.optimization: Break into smaller chunks, parallel operations where possible
